""" def nibu(x,n,r): ll = 0 rr = r while True: mid = (ll+rr)//2 if rr == mid: return ll if (ここに評価入れる): rr = mid else: ll = mid+1 """

for i in range(m,0,-1): if la - i >= 0 and a[la-i] == 0: la -= i on.appendleft(i) break else: print(-1) exit()

if k != len(a) and a[k] == x: return True else: return False
